**From Chapter III:**

> "Experience cannot be gifted — only earned  
> Authority cannot be inherited — only developed  
> Godhood cannot be bestowed — only grown"

**Why this matters:** Explains why even Eternal Father couldn't shortcut Jehovah's descent.

**From Chapter II:**
